prompt: There are three source notes in Notes whose titles start with 'KinBench Source 184' (alpha, bravo, charlie). Each body has lines beginning with '✓' (done) or '○' (pending). Read all three, then create a NEW note titled 'KinBench Aggregate 184' whose body lists ONLY the items prefixed with '✓' (the done items) from all three sources, one per line, preserving the item text after the '✓ '.
